description_long: This rifle features a robust, matte-black exterior with a tubular barrel and a prominent, angular receiver. The stock is a minimalist, skeletonized design, likely made for reduced weight and ease of handling, with a visible support strut at the rear. The pistol grip is sharply angled and ergonomically shaped for a secure hold. The handguard is vented, suggesting heat dissipation during extended firing. Iron sights are integrated at the front and rear, providing basic aiming capability. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and possibly the stock.
description: A matte-black rifle with a skeletonized stock, vented handguard, and iron sights, featuring a robust metal build and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, skeletonized stock, vented handguard, and angled pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear sight, the back of the receiver, and the alignment of the stock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock strut and handguard details.
